name: Roasted Tomato and Goat Cheese Salad
recipeIngredient: Salt and freshly ground black pepper -- to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 300 degrees F.
2. Halve and seed the tomatoes, seasoning with salt and pepper.
3. Lay the tomatoes on a baking rack set over a cookie sheet in the oven for 20 minutes, or until the skins slip off easily.
4. Meanwhile, combine the olive oil, balsamic vinegar, and chopped herbs.
5. Remove the tomatoes from the oven, slipping off their skins, and brush the tomato halves lightly with this vinaigrette.
6. Return the tomatoes to the oven to roast for 1 hour more.
7. Slice the Montrachet log into 12 equal-size disks and brush each disk with the vinaigrette.
8. Remove the tomatoes from the oven and divide them among 4 salad plates, alternating slices of goat cheese and roasted tomato halves.
9. Toss the greens with the remaining vinaigrette and place half a cup alongside each serving of tomatoes and cheese.
Yield: 4 servings
